description: Publish and Notify Student | Retry Mechanism

title: Notification Retry – First Attempt Fails – System retries up to 3 times before stopping
description: AC 02.3 — Negative Testing — When the first notification delivery attempt fails the system automatically retries up to 3 times. NOTE: Requires simulated failure via backend/mock tooling.
preconditions: User is logged into SF with the Publish Lesson With Notification" custom permission (member of the Renseikai OOP Permission Set)

v2.id: Published lesson with Student A assigned
Notification delivery pipeline configured to fail on all attempts (simulated failure)
Access to system logs or admin dashboard"
is_flaky:
1. Navigate to the SF Lesson Detail page of the Published lesson
2. Click "Publish and notify student" then click "Send"
3. Observe the SF page for any visible failure indicator
4. In the system audit log / admin dashboard verify retry attempts
5. Verify no further retry beyond 3 attempts
layer:
1. Lesson Detail page opens
2. Modal closes without error shown to SF user
3. No error banner or blocking UI shown to the operator
4. Exactly 3 delivery attempts logged each marked failed with short interval between attempts
5. No 4th attempt logged; retry loop stopped
steps_type:
1. Published lesson ID
2. ""
3. ""
4. System audit log or admin dashboard
5. System audit log

title: Notification Retry – Retry Succeeds – Only one notification delivered to recipient
description: AC 02.3 — Negative Testing + Regression Analysis — When delivery fails on attempt 1 but succeeds on attempt 2 the recipient receives exactly one push notification (no duplicates). NOTE: Requires simulated failure on attempt 1 and success on attempt 2.
preconditions: User is logged into SF with the Publish Lesson With Notification" custom permission (member of the Renseikai OOP Permission Set)

v2.id: Published lesson with Student A assigned
Notification delivery configured to fail on attempt 1 and succeed on attempt 2
Student A logged into Learner App on Device 1 with push enabled"
is_flaky:
1. Navigate to the SF Lesson Detail page of the Published lesson
2. Click "Publish and notify student" then click "Send"
3. Wait for retry interval to elapse (backend delivers on 2nd attempt)
4. On Device 1 check Student A's Learner App notification inbox
5. In the system audit log verify attempt records
layer:
1. Lesson Detail page opens
2. Modal closes
3. System completes delivery on attempt 2
4. Student A receives exactly one push notification with title "Lesson Published" — no duplicate
5. Log shows attempt 1: FAILED attempt 2: SUCCESS; no further attempts
steps_type:
1. Published lesson ID
2. ""
3. ""
4. Student A Learner App account
5. System audit log

title: Notification Retry – All Attempts Logged – Each attempt recorded in system audit log
description: AC 02.3 — Regression Analysis — Every notification delivery attempt (success or failure) is recorded in the system audit log. Smoke test. NOTE: Requires access to backend logs or admin dashboard.
preconditions: User is logged into SF with the Publish Lesson With Notification" custom permission (member of the Renseikai OOP Permission Set)

v2.id: Published lesson with Student A assigned
Access to system audit log or admin dashboard"
is_flaky:
1. Navigate to the SF Lesson Detail page of the Published lesson
2. Click "Publish and notify student" then click "Send"
3. In the system audit log locate the log entry for this notification event
layer:
1. Lesson Detail page opens
2. Modal closes; notification delivered successfully on first attempt
3. Log entry exists for the notification attempt with status SUCCESS timestamp lesson ID and recipient ID
steps_type:
1. Published lesson ID
2. ""
3. System audit log

title: Notification Retry – All 3 Attempts Fail – Failure event logged in system
description: AC 02.3 — Negative Testing — When all 3 delivery attempts fail a clear failure event is logged in the error log or admin dashboard. NOTE: Requires simulated failure on all 3 attempts via backend tooling.
preconditions: User is logged into SF with the Publish Lesson With Notification" custom permission (member of the Renseikai OOP Permission Set)

v2.id: Published lesson with Student A assigned
Notification delivery pipeline configured to fail on all 3 attempts
Access to system error log or admin dashboard"
is_flaky:
1. Navigate to the SF Lesson Detail page of the Published lesson
2. Click "Publish and notify student" then click "Send"
3. Wait for all 3 retry attempts to complete
4. In the system error log / admin dashboard locate the failure record
layer:
1. Lesson Detail page opens
2. Modal closes; no error shown to SF user in the UI
3. No notification delivered to the recipient device
4. Clear failure log entry exists indicating all 3 attempts failed; log includes lesson ID recipient ID and failure reason for each attempt
steps_type:
